abilities.name: Armor +1
abilities.description: Reduce all damage suffered by this character by 1, to a minimum of 1.

abilities.name: Frightening Authority
abilities.description: Other friendly Guardsmen characters within a6 gain +1 to Willpower duels.

abilities.name: Attennn-Hut!
abilities.description: Other friendly Guardsmen within a6 gain +1 Rank Value and are immune to Slow.

actions: (1) Breaching Axe (Heavy Melee) | AV: 5 (12) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Ram Critical Strike: When damaging, deals +1 damage per Ram.
(1) Collier Single Action Army (Pistol) | AV: 5 (12) | Rg: z12 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Capacity 6, Reload 2.
(0) Shout Orders (Leadership) | Target friendly Guardsman within 10 yards immediately performs a (1) Action.
system.notes: Guild Guard veterans promoted to Sergeant after demonstrating leadership in combat.
